messages.author: priya
messages.text: A config deploy is too blunt for the new checkout; we need to turn it on tenant by tenant.

messages.author: liam
messages.text: Use a feature flag in Postgres, evaluated by the API. Redis caching is okay if a flag flip invalidates immediately.

messages.author: zoe
messages.text: I was leaning LaunchDarkly, but lets avoid another vendor for this first rollout.
